sqlMap.select: select * from MarketableProductCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
select CoverageKey, MarketableProductKey from MarketableProductCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
sqlMap.update:
update MarketableProductCoverage set
where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from MarketableProductCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
delete from MarketableProductCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
sqlMap.select: select CoverageKey, MarketableProductKey from MarketableProductCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
select CoverageKey, MarketableProductKey from MarketableProductCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
